settings.title: Oil Build-up
settings.text: Excess oil can mix with dead skin cells and impurities throughout the day.

settings.title: Congested Skin
settings.text: When pores become congested, breakouts can become more noticeable.

settings.title: Weakened Skin Barrier
settings.text: Using harsh products too often can leave skin feeling stressed and uncomfortable.

settings.title: Cleanse
settings.text: Start by washing away excess oil, sunscreen and daily impurities.

settings.title: Prepare
settings.text: Hydrate and prepare your skin before the next steps.

settings.title: Support
settings.text: Help maintain a healthy-looking skin barrier with lightweight hydration.

settings.title: Protect
settings.text: Finish with broad-spectrum SPF 50 PA++++ protection every morning.

settings.title: Clarifying Face Wash
settings.text: Designed to gently cleanse away excess oil, dirt and daily impurities without using sulphates.

settings.title: Radiance Toner
settings.text: Helps prepare your skin for the next steps while supporting a fresh, balanced-looking complexion.

settings.title: Barrier Repair Moisturizer
settings.text: Lightweight daily hydration designed to support your skin barrier without feeling heavy.

settings.title: Ultra Light Sunscreen
settings.text: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 PA++++ protection with a lightweight finish suitable for everyday wear.
Your skin feels oily or combination.
You prefer consistency over complicated ingredient routines.

settings.result: Skin may begin feeling cleaner and more balanced with consistent daily use.*
Consistency helps support healthier-looking skin over time.

settings.question: Can I use this routine every day?
settings.answer: Yes, this routine is designed to be gentle enough for daily use, both morning and night.

settings.question: Can beginners use it?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We've removed the guesswork, making it the perfect starting point for anyone new to skincare.

settings.question: Will it work with oily skin?
settings.answer: Yes, these products are formulated to help manage excess oil without stripping your skin's natural moisture barrier.

settings.question: Can I add products later?
settings.answer: Yes! Once you build consistency with these core steps, you can introduce targeted serums or treatments.

settings.question: Can I buy products individually?
settings.answer: Yes, all items in this routine are available for individual purchase when you need a refill.

settings.question: Can teenagers use this routine?
settings.answer: Yes, the gentle nature of these formulations makes them suitable for teenage skin experiencing breakouts.

settings.question: How long does one routine last?
settings.answer: With standard daily use, this routine should last approximately 45-60 days.

settings.hero_heading:
Stop guessing.
Start following a routine.
settings.hero_paragraph:
You don't need to learn every skincare ingredient to care for your skin.

If you're dealing with breakouts, the best place to start is a simple routine you can actually stick to.

Our Clear Skin Routine combines four daily essentials designed to cleanse, support and protect acne-prone skin.
settings.understanding_heading: Healthy skin starts with understanding the problem.
settings.understanding_bottom_text:
Healthy skin isn't built by buying more products.
It's built by following the right routine consistently.
settings.routine_description:
A complete daily skincare routine created for acne-prone skin.
Each product has a role.
Together they create a routine that's simple enough to follow every day.
settings.who_heading: Is This Routine Right For You?
settings.individuals_heading: Start with one product. Upgrade whenever you're ready.
settings.individuals_subheading:
Every product is available individually.
But routines are designed to make skincare simpler by giving each product a clear role.
settings.final_heading: Still not sure where to begin?
settings.final_paragraph: Answer four simple questions and we'll recommend the routine that's right for your skin.
